query:
SELECT p.id, p.date, p.dayType, sb.title, sb.blockType, sb.durationMin
FROM dailyPlans p
JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.planId = p.id
WHERE p.date >= '2027-07-01' AND p.date <= '2027-07-31'
ORDER BY p.date, sb.sortOrder;
